title: Charlotte Weather Update: Hot Midweek, Cooler Weekend
summary: Midweek will be hot and humid, followed by a significant cooldown for the weekend.

title: Charlotte Drug and Gun Bust: Five Arrested
summary: A six-month investigation led to the arrest of five individuals at a Charlotte hotel for alleged drug and gun trafficking.

title: Charlotte Airport Begins Firehouse Construction for Expansion
summary: Charlotte Douglas International Airport breaks ground on Firehouse 47 as part of its $1.006 billion expansion, enhancing emergency response.

title: Mother Seeks Answers After Child Injured at Daycare
summary: A Cleveland County mother demands answers after her 5-year-old son suffered a serious ear injury at daycare.

title: Charlotte Man Living with ALS Receives Support

title: Davidson Mom's Pickleball Brand Hits Target Shelves

title: Deadly Shooting in NoDa Stemmed from Bar Fight
summary: A bar fight in NoDa led to the fatal shooting of Taylor Sylver. Adaysia Coles has been arrested in Alabama.

title: Rowan County Deputy Rescues Colleague from Burning Car

title: Scammers Impersonating Police Demand Jury Duty Payment

title: CMS Asks Families to Register for Bus Transportation

title: Charlotte City Council Sets Timeline to Replace Mayor Lyles
summary: Charlotte City Council sets the timeline for applications to replace Mayor Vi Lyles, opening June 2 and closing June 9.

title: 80-Year-Old Man Dies in Catawba Fire

title: Groups Urge Ban on ICE at Charlotte Soccer Match
